name: DronesKillAnimals
short_description: Under a watchtower filled with wild animals, you will play the role of a high-tech drone operator, protecting the watchtower and surrounding area from various animal invasions. By precise shooting and strategic movement, you need to drive and control different types of animals
detailed_description: Under a watchtower filled with wild animals, you will play the role of a high-tech drone operator, protecting the watchtower and surrounding area from various animal invasions. Through precise shooting and strategic movement, you need to drive and control different types of animals, explore more areas, and jointly maintain this beautiful natural environment.
about_the_game: Under a watchtower filled with wild animals, you will play the role of a high-tech drone operator, protecting the watchtower and surrounding area from various animal invasions. Through precise shooting and strategic movement, you need to drive and control different types of animals, explore more areas, and jointly maintain this beautiful natural environment.
supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English*, French*, German*, Russian*, Japanese*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Spanish - Latin America*, Korean*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
